info.title: PurviewDataEstateHealth
info.description: Creates a data plane client for Purview Data Estate Health.

parameters.description: The endpoint of the Purview Data Estate Health service. Example: https://api.purview-service.microsoft.com/

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Aggregation type: 'ControlNode' for individual controls, 'ControlGroup' for control groups.

AggregatedScore.description: Score data aggregated by control or control group. The shape of items depends on the `type` query parameter used in the request: when `type=ControlNode`, `controlId` and `computingJobId` are populated; when `type=ControlGroup`, those fields are omitted.

controlId.description: The control ID. Present only when the query was issued with `type=ControlNode`.

computingJobId.description: The computing job ID. Present only when the query was issued with `type=ControlNode`.

jobId.description: The unique identifier of the job.

errorMessage.description: Error message if the job failed.

timeStamp.description: The timestamp of the log entry.

AnalyticsScheduleRequest.description: Request to create or update an analytics schedule.

frequency.description: The frequency of the analytics schedule.

startTime.description: The start time of the schedule.

endTime.description: The end time of the schedule.

timeZone.description: The time zone for the schedule.

id.description: The unique identifier of the assessment.

targetEntityType.description: The kind of entity this assessment evaluates.

targetQualityType.description: The quality dimension this assessment evaluates.

rules.description: The rules that constitute this assessment.

continuationToken.description: Continuation token for the next page of results.

AssessmentRule.description: A rule attached to an assessment. The `rule` payload uses the shared Rule discriminated union.

id.description: The unique identifier of the rule within the assessment.

rule.description: The rule definition (simple, group, or expression).

actionProperties.description: Optional metadata describing what to do when the rule fires.

AssessmentRuleActionProperties.description: Action metadata applied when an assessment rule fires (e.g. for health alerts).

name.description: Human-readable name for the resulting action.

reason.description: Why the rule fired, surfaced to end users.

recommendation.description: Recommended remediation surfaced to end users.

AssessmentRuleSeverity.description: Severity classification for an assessment rule's action.

AssessmentTargetEntityType.description: Target entity kind evaluated by an assessment.

AssessmentTargetQualityType.description: Quality dimension evaluated by an assessment.

code.description: One of a server-defined set of error codes.

message.description: A human-readable representation of the error.

details.description: An array of details about specific errors that led to this reported error.

innererror.description: An object containing more specific information than the current object about the error.

Azure.Core.Foundations.InnerError.description: An object containing more specific information about the error. As per Azure REST API guidelines - https://aka.ms/AzureRestApiGuidelines#handling-errors.

code.description: One of a server-defined set of error codes.

ContactItem.description: A single contact reference on a governance entity.

description.description: Free-form description of the contact's relationship to the entity.

Contacts.description: Contacts grouped by role for a governance entity.

owner.description: Principals identified as owners of the entity.

expert.description: Principals identified as subject-matter experts on the entity.

Control.description: A governance control resource. Use the `type` discriminator to determine whether this is a ControlGroup or ControlNode.

id.description: The unique identifier of the control.

contacts.description: Contacts associated with the control, grouped by role.

reserved.description: True when the control is reserved (system-managed).

statusPaletteConfig.description: Configuration for selecting a status palette for the control.

type.description: Discriminates between control group and control node variants.

systemTemplate.description: The system template name used to seed this control.

systemTemplateEntityId.description: The system template entity id used to seed this control.

scores.description: Recent score history for the control (server-computed).

lastRefreshed.description: Timestamp of the last server-side refresh of computed fields.

statusPalette.description: Resolved status palette currently applied to the control (server-computed).

group.description: Resolved parent group name (server-computed from typeProperties.groupId).

ControlGroup.description: A control group aggregating child controls.

continuationToken.description: Continuation token for the next page of results.

ControlNode.description: A leaf control that performs evaluations.

typeProperties.description: Type-specific properties for this control node.

ControlNodeTypeProperties.description: Type-specific properties present on ControlNode variants.

domains.description: Business domain ids this control applies to.

assessmentId.description: The assessment id evaluated by this control, when applicable.

ControlScore.description: An individual score record returned with control responses.

time.description: The time the score was recorded.

controlGroupId.description: The owning control group id, when scored at group level.

controlId.description: The owning control id, when scored at node level.

systemData.description: System metadata for the score record.

computingJobId.description: Identifier of the computing job that produced this score.

ControlStatusPaletteConfig.description: Configuration for selecting a status palette for a control.

fallbackStatusPaletteId.description: The palette to apply when no rule matches.

targetScore.description: The target score used by certain palette rules.

statusPaletteRules.description: Rules evaluated in order to select a palette.

ControlStatusPaletteRule.description: A single status palette assignment based on a rule. When the rule evaluates true the referenced palette is applied.

statusPaletteId.description: The palette to apply when the rule matches.

rule.description: The rule that drives the palette assignment.

values.name: ControlGroup
values.description: A control group that aggregates child controls.

values.name: ControlNode
values.description: A leaf control that performs evaluations.

DataSourceType.description: Supported data source types for managed private endpoints.

values.name: ADLSGen2
values.description: Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2 data source.

ExpressionRule.description: A rule whose evaluation is driven by an expression string.

ExpressionRuleTypeProperties.description: Type-specific properties for an expression rule.

checkPoint.description: The data point evaluated by the expression.

ManagedPrivateEndpointExistsResponse.description: Response indicating whether a managed private endpoint exists.

mpeStatus.description: The status of the managed private endpoint.

targetResourceId.description: The Azure resource ID of the target resource.

ManagedPrivateEndpointRequest.description: Request to check or create a managed private endpoint.

targetResourceId.description: The Azure resource ID of the target resource.

NetworkProperties.description: Network properties including managed private endpoint information.

isManagedVnetEnabled.description: Whether managed virtual network is enabled.

targetResourceId.description: The Azure resource ID of the target resource.

mpeStatus.description: The status of the managed private endpoint.

markedForDeletion.description: Whether the endpoint is marked for deletion.

QueryScoresRequest.description: Unified request for querying scores. When type=ControlNode, provide controlIds. When type=ControlGroup, provide controlGroupIds.

recordLatestCounts.description: Number of latest score records to return.

controlIds.description: The control IDs to query scores for. Required when type=ControlNode.

controlGroupIds.description: The control group IDs to query scores for. Required when type=ControlGroup.

start.description: The start of the time range.

end.description: The end of the time range.

Recurrence.description: Fine-grained recurrence pattern for a control schedule.

hours.description: Hours of the day at which to run (0 through 23).

minutes.description: Minutes of the hour at which to run (0 through 59).

monthDays.description: Days of the month on which to run (1 through 31).

weekDays.description: Days of the week on which to run.

Rule.description: Base shape for a governance rule. Use the `type` discriminator to determine which concrete rule variant is present.

RuleCheckPoint.description: Identifier of a checkable property within a rule.

RuleGroup.description: A rule that combines nested rules with a logical operator.

typeProperties.description: The group's type-specific properties (groupOperator + nested rules).

RuleGroupOperator.description: Logical combinator for a rule group.

RuleGroupTypeProperties.description: Type-specific properties for a rule group.

rules.description: The nested rules combined by groupOperator.

RuleOperator.description: Comparison operator for a simple rule.

values.name: RuleGroup
values.description: A logical group combining nested rules.

id.description: The unique identifier of the schedule.

interval.description: The interval between schedule runs, expressed in the unit defined by frequency.

startTime.description: The start time of the schedule.

endTime.description: The end time of the schedule.

recurrence.description: Fine-grained recurrence pattern within the chosen frequency.

timeZone.description: The time zone (IANA name) used to interpret startTime, endTime, and recurrence.

ScheduleMonthlyOccurrence.description: A monthly occurrence specification for a control schedule (e.g. the 2nd Tuesday of each month).

occurrence.description: The ordinal occurrence within the month (e.g. 1 for first, 2 for second).

ScheduleWeekDay.description: Day of the week used by control schedule recurrence.

SimpleRule.description: A leaf rule that compares a checkPoint against an operand using an operator.

SimpleRuleTypeProperties.description: Type-specific properties for a simple rule.

operand.description: The operand to compare against. Optional for operators that take no operand (e.g. IsNull).

id.description: The unique identifier of the palette.

color.description: The palette color (typically a hex code).

StorageConfig.description: Storage configuration for Purview Data Estate Health.

id.description: Unique identifier of the storage configuration.

type.description: Type of storage backing this configuration.

systemData.description: System data envelope for the storage configuration.

typeProperties.description: Type-specific properties whose shape depends on the storage `type`.

networkProperties.description: Network properties associated with the storage configuration.

StorageConfigConnectivityResult.description: Result of a storage configuration connectivity test.

succeeded.description: Whether the connectivity test was successful.

message.description: Diagnostic message describing the connectivity test outcome. Empty string when the test succeeded.

StorageConfigNetworkProperties.description: Network properties associated with a storage configuration, including managed virtual network and managed private endpoint information.

isManagedVnetEnabled.description: Whether managed virtual network is enabled for this storage configuration.

targetResourceId.description: The Azure resource ID of the target storage resource.

mpeStatus.description: The status of the managed private endpoint. Possible values include `Approved`, `Rejected`, `Pending`, `Provisioning`, or an empty string when no endpoint exists.

markedForDeletion.description: Whether the managed private endpoint is marked for deletion.

StorageConfigTypeProperties.description:
Type-specific properties for the storage configuration. The actual fields
populated depend on the parent StorageConfig.type: `locationURL` is set when
type is `Fabric`; `endpoint` is set when type is `ADLSGen2`.

locationURL.description: Fabric workspace location URL. Required when StorageConfig.type is `Fabric`.

endpoint.description: Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2 endpoint URL. Required when StorageConfig.type is `ADLSGen2`.

StorageConfigUpdate.description: Partial storage configuration payload used when updating the configuration or testing its connectivity. All properties are optional so callers can supply only the fields they want to change or validate.

id.description: Unique identifier of the storage configuration.

type.description: Type of storage backing this configuration.

systemData.description: System data envelope for the storage configuration.

typeProperties.description: Type-specific properties whose shape depends on the storage `type`.

networkProperties.description: Network properties associated with the storage configuration.

StorageStatus.description: Status of a Purview Data Estate Health storage configuration.

StorageType.description: Type of storage backing a Purview Data Estate Health storage configuration.

values.name: ADLSGen2
values.description: Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2 storage.

createdBy.description: The unique identifier of the user who created the resource.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the resource was created.

lastModifiedBy.description: The unique identifier of the user who last modified the resource.

lastModifiedAt.description: The timestamp when the resource was last modified.

Azure.Core.Foundations.ApiVersionParamet.name: api-version
Azure.Core.Foundations.ApiVersionParamet.description: The API version to use for this operation.
